description.value: Aura moderate evocation [good]; CL 7th; Slot feet; Price 20,000 gp; Weight 4 lbs. DESCRIPTION These gleaming mithral horseshoes are imbued with heavenly power. The horseshoes grant the holy weapon special ability to the wearer’s hoof attacks, and if the wearer hits an evil-aligned target with both hooves in the same round, the target is staggered for 1 round ( Fortitude DC 16 negates). In addition, the wearer gains a +2 sacred bonus on bull rush, drag, and overrun combat maneuvers. If the wearer is a mount and the rider uses the Trample feat, add 2 to the rider’s overrun combat maneuver check. If the wearer uses the trample special ability, increase the trample DC by 2; if the target fails its save against the trample attempt, add the damage from the holy weapon special ability to the trample damage. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor, Craft Wondrous Item; Spells holy smite; Special creator must be good; Cost 10,000 gp
